text:
Once upon a time in a quiet forest, there lived a shy squirrel named Sunny. Sunny loved nothing more than navigating through the towering oak trees collecting nuts. One sunny afternoon, while munching on acorns by a shimmering stream, Sunny heard a peculiar rustling.

Curiosity getting the best of him, Sunny darted over. To his astonishment, he spotted a rabbit with floppy ears wearing skinny jeans and a bomber jacket singing humatically. Sunny didn’t know what to think—it was bizarre!

The rabbit saw Sunny staring. “Hey there!” it chuckled. “Just singing a little tune. What’s your name?”

“A squirrel!” Sunny squeaked.

“I’m Bearcrawler. You seem chill. Want to hear something funny?”

Sunny nodded eagerly.

Bearcrawler whistled. Out popped three turtles wearing fedoras. “We're the Beatnik Torters. What should we sing?”

“Oh.” Sunny thought. “Probably something light.”

They all started crooning vintage tunes. Sunny
